command:
printf '--- tests ---
'; find tests -maxdepth 3 -type f | sort | sed 's#^#/#' | grep -E 'fixture|workflow|parity|smoke|report' || true; printf '
--- src tests ---
'; find src/tests -maxdepth 4 -type f | sort | sed 's#^#/#' | grep -E 'fixture|workflow|parity|smoke|report|contract' || true; printf '
--- likely code ---
'; find src -maxdepth 5 -type f | sort | sed 's#^#/#' | grep -E 'workflow|BMAD|bmad|parity|artifact|milestone|slice|task|gsd' | head -200 || true
